brief_title: CARE Initiative: Real-world Emulation of the PALOMA-2 Trial
official_title: CARE Initiative Study: Real-world Emulation of the PALOMA-2 Comparative Effectiveness Trial of Palbociclib and Letrozole vs. Placebo and Letrozole for the First-line Treatment of ER+/HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer

pmids.citation: Finn RS, Martin M, Rugo HS, Jones S, Im SA, Gelmon K, Harbeck N, Lipatov ON, Walshe JM, Moulder S, Gauthier E, Lu DR, Randolph S, Dieras V, Slamon DJ. Palbociclib and Letrozole in Advanced Breast Cancer. N Engl J Med. 2016 Nov 17;375(20):1925-1936. doi: 10.1056/NEJMoa1607303.
